summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FixMySite AI iteration 2 with new features. Fixed backend routing bug, all APIs working correctly including new quick-scan endpoint. Frontend fully functional with two-phase analysis flow, language toggle, and all UI components working perfectly.
passed_tests: POST /api/quick-scan works correctly with https://google.com (score: 52, HTTPS detected, 0.09s response time)
POST /api/analyze works with OPENAI_API_KEY configured (score: 92, money lost: 50000€/month)
GET /api/analyses/history correctly returns 401 for unauthenticated users
POST /api/payments/create-checkout creates Stripe checkout session successfully
Landing page loads correctly with hero section, URL input, analyze button
Header shows logo, language toggle (ES/EN), and login button
Two-phase analysis flow: quick scan appears first, then AI results after 10-15 seconds
Quick scan results card displays score, response time, HTTPS badge, and individual check items
Full AI analysis results show score display, money lost counter, sub-scores, errors, opportunities, recommendations
PDF export button is visible and clickable in analysis results
Language toggle switches between ES and EN correctly (text changes verified)
Analysis history correctly hidden for unauthenticated users
Floating CTA button visible and functional
Login button is clickable and functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI elements and interactions working)
